audit_items.proof_trace: The staleness check at line 162 directly implements the property: `if (report.observationsTimestamp < block.timestamp - feedInfo.stalenessThreshold) revert Errors.StaleFeedData()` is applied to every report in the loop with no early exit. The stalenessThreshold is guaranteed nonzero by _applyFeedInfoUpdates validation, the feedId is guaranteed allowlisted by the first loop, and no other code path writes to s_dataStreamsPrice.
